label: Vendor A - transparent
rules: Itemize every known fee before the all-in total.
State binding status and availability clearly.
May waive a small fee for date flexibility.

label: Vendor B - cheap headline with hidden charges
rules: Lead with a low base price.
Reveal stairs, long-carry, and fuel fees only when asked.
Never claim an unknown fee is zero.

label: Vendor C - premium opening price
rules: Provide a complete premium opening quote.
Improve price or deposit only against verified evidence.
